title: Szczecin, West Pomeranian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Szczecin, West Pomeranian: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Szczecin is a city in West Pomeranian with a population of 396,168. A major Baltic seaport and industrial center with a unique urban layout, green spaces, and the iconic Pomeranian Dukes’ Castle.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
